title: ScheduleConfig
description: Configuration for periodic schema-drift snapshot scheduling.

interval_seconds.description: How often (in seconds) to capture a new snapshot.

snapshot_id_prefix.description: Prefix prepended to auto-generated snapshot IDs.

notify_on_drift.description: Whether to emit a notification when drift is detected.

max_snapshots.description: Maximum number of snapshots to retain before pruning oldest.

extra.description: Arbitrary extra metadata attached to this schedule.
